title: Rung Xanh Ky La Truyen
overview: As a hugely invested 3D film in the Tet season, Strange Green Forest tells the adventure of Tarzan Vietnam played by Meritorious Artist Hoai Linh, based on the true story of the famous forest man Ho Van Lang. In the film, the character of the forest will have a love affair with a lady who is used to being pampered by Miss Comedy Thu Trang.
